steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage shows an artist "was chosen for her lifetime contributions to the arts" within the context of an exceptional arts fellowship. The blank must describe what the fellowship does for these artists — recognition and celebration.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choice
steps.content:
The blank needs a word meaning to recognize and celebrate — the National Heritage Fellowship was created to ______ exceptional folk and traditional artists. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Begin: the fellowship was created to begin exceptional artists — begin means to start something; awarding a fellowship is an act of recognition, not of launching someone's career. ✗
  • Choice B — Distract: the fellowship was created to distract exceptional artists — distract means to divert attention; a prestigious award draws attention toward an artist, not away from their work. ✗
  • Choice C — Overshadow: the fellowship was created to overshadow exceptional artists — overshadow means to eclipse or diminish; this contradicts the celebratory purpose of the fellowship. ✗
  • Choice D — Honor: the fellowship was created to honor exceptional artists — honor means to show respect and recognition, matching a fellowship awarded for lifetime contributions to the arts. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
